title: Reorder stack in a stacked bar chart

posts.author: bikran (Bikran Sandhu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Is there a way to order how the statuses on a stacked bar chart are stacked?

For example, I currently have two stacked bar charts that stack based on different status columns. One of my statuses are numbered 1-5. The other is numbered 1-2.

One of my charts displays the information correctly (stacked 1, 2, 3, 4, and then 5) but the other chart stacks the information backwards (starting with status 2 and then status 1).

Any way to fix this?

posts.author: leethecoup (Lee Slimming)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @bikran - did you solve this? I am having a similar problem. I am trying to use a stacked graph for forecasting and I want to stack by status but in a specific order. Thank you!

posts.author: pbingen (Pit Bingen)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, same request. Any way of influencing the order? It seems random

posts.author: ozkanerinc (Özkan Erinç)
posts.cookedHtml: I have same problem, would be super useful if it is developed.

posts.author: bikran (Bikran Sandhu)
posts.cookedHtml: I was told there’s no solution to reorder the colors. It is based on an internal numbering system. If you change the colors they will be reordered.

posts.author: pbingen (Pit Bingen)
posts.cookedHtml: Well, were you told about the colour sequence? that could be a work-around at least.

posts.author: bikran (Bikran Sandhu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes I was - here you go:
https://view.monday.com/1073554546-ad9f20a427a16e67ded630108994c11b?r=use1

posts.author: chole (chloe warren)
posts.cookedHtml: I made a feature request to add sorting options for the stacked by if anyone wants to follow along

posts.author: bingolittle (c.j.d.coles@gmail.com)
posts.cookedHtml: The colour sorting doesn’t work for me. I only have 2 categories and can switch the colours and yet my chart displays the same incorrect way.

posts.author: Jonathan-BookCheck (Jonathan Clayton)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think this has now been solved.

The “Customize” menu within the chart options allows you to drag each stack-block up/down the bar(s) as required (see below).

Capture290×340 12.7 KB
